text: Why did the police have to push Jumbo off the main street?
zh: 为什么警察不得不把小象金宝推离主街?

text: Last Christmas, the circus owner, Jimmy Gates, decided to take some presents to a children's hospital.
zh: 去年圣诞节,马戏团老板吉米·盖茨决定给儿童医院送一些礼物。

text: Dressed up as Father Christmas and accompanied by a 'guard of honour' of six pretty girls,
zh: 他打扮成圣诞老人,身边还跟着由六位漂亮姑娘组成的'仪仗队',

text: he set off down the main street of the city riding a baby elephant called Jumbo.
zh: 骑着一头名叫金宝的小象,沿着市里的主街出发了。

text: He should have known that the police would never allow this sort of thing.
zh: 他本该知道,警察是绝不会允许这种事情的。

text: A policeman approached Jimmy and told him he ought to have gone along a side street as Jumbo was holding up the traffic.
zh: 一名警察走近吉米,告诉他应该走小巷,因为金宝挡住了交通。

text: Though Jimmy agreed to go at once, Jumbo refused to move.
zh: 虽然吉米立刻同意照办,可金宝却不肯挪动。

text: Fifteen policemen had to push very hard to get him off the main street.
zh: 十五名警察费了好大力气才把它推离主街。

text: The police had a difficult time, but they were most amused.
zh: 警察们费尽周折,却都觉得十分好笑。

text: 'Jumbo must weigh a few tons,' said a policeman afterwards,
zh: 一位警察事后说:'金宝一定有好几吨重,

text: 'so it was fortunate that we didn't have to carry him.
Of course, we should arrest him, but as he has a good record, we shall let him off this time.'
zh: 当然,我们本该逮捕它,但鉴于它一向表现良好,这次就放它一马吧。'
